sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40419" key="e)pipaistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπαιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἐπιπαίζω</etym>) <sense id="n40419.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">droll</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρόβλημα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:63" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">63</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
